wordplay_note: Aims at God but overshoots into death
card_description: Timothy Archer (meaning "Timothy = honoring God; Archer = seeker-aimer") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Transmigration of Timothy Archer*. Episcopal bishop based on James Pike who pursues ancient documents to Israel and dies. Name note: Aims at God but overshoots into death. The religious seeker whose sincerity leads to destruction — faith as fatal quest. First appears in *The Transmigration of Timothy Archer*.

reference.brief: Episcopal bishop based on James Pike who pursues ancient documents to Israel and dies
reference.significance: The religious seeker whose sincerity leads to destruction — faith as fatal quest
